expected_signals.summary: Anthropic introduced Reflect, a Claude dashboard feature, and made it available in beta for Free, Pro, and Max users with memory turned on.
The feature is presented as shaping how users think about AI by framing Claude as part of everyday workflow.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: shaping how users think about AI itself

expected_signals.summary: Reflect can deepen workflow integration and support retention by steering users toward more embedded Claude usage.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: helps retain users and discourage them from switching

expected_signals.summary: Anthropic acknowledges the potentially addictive nature of AI chatbot use by offering quiet hours and break nudges.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: potentially addictive nature of working with AI chatbots

expected_signals.summary: Anthropic said sensitive conversations appear only at a high level, health-linked chats are excluded, and insights data is not reused for other purposes.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: None of the data in your insights is used for other purposes

notes: Core subject is Anthropic's Reflect feature and the article's interpretation of its retention role. Manual proof: each anchor_quote was cross-checked as a verbatim substring in the provided text; this extraction-only task has no separate runnable verifier.
